nodes.title: Step 3 - Find node (fast) 💾
widgets_values: 1. Draw a **link** from the **VIDEO** output into the canvas and select **Save Video.**

nodes.title: Model Links
widgets_values:
## Report workflow issue

If you found any issues when running this workflow, [report template issue here](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/workflow_templates/issues).


## Model links

**diffusion_models**

- [wan2.2_i2v_high_noise_14B_fp8_scaled.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Wan_2.2_ComfyUI_Repackaged/resolve/main/split_files/diffusion_models/wan2.2_i2v_high_noise_14B_fp8_scaled.safetensors)

- [wan2.2_i2v_low_noise_14B_fp8_scaled.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Wan_2.2_ComfyUI_Repackaged/resolve/main/split_files/diffusion_models/wan2.2_i2v_low_noise_14B_fp8_scaled.safetensors)

**loras**

- [Wan2.2-Lightning_I2V-A14B-4steps-lora_HIGH_fp16.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/WanVideo_comfy/resolve/main/LoRAs/Wan22-Lightning/old/Wan2.2-Lightning_I2V-A14B-4steps-lora_HIGH_fp16.safetensors)

- [Wan2.2-Lightning_I2V-A14B-4steps-lora_LOW_fp16.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/WanVideo_comfy/resolve/main/LoRAs/Wan22-Lightning/old/Wan2.2-Lightning_I2V-A14B-4steps-lora_LOW_fp16.safetensors)

**text_encoders**

- [umt5_xxl_fp8_e4m3fn_scaled.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Wan_2.2_ComfyUI_Repackaged/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/umt5_xxl_fp8_e4m3fn_scaled.safetensors)


**vae**

- [wan_2.1_vae.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Wan_2.2_ComfyUI_Repackaged/resolve/main/split_files/vae/wan_2.1_vae.safetensors)


## Model Storage Location

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 diffusion_models/
│   │      └── wan2.2_i2v_high_noise_14B_fp8_scaled.safetensors
│   │      └── wan2.2_i2v_low_noise_14B_fp8_scaled.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 text_encoders/
│   │      └── umt5_xxl_fp8_e4m3fn_scaled.safetensors
│   └── 📂 vae/
│          └── wan_2.1_vae.safetensors
```

nodes.title: Step 2 - Find node ✨
widgets_values:
1. **Double-click** into the canvas and type **Create Video.** 👇

2. Connect the **Create Video** node with a link.
3. Set fps to 16

nodes.title: Step 1 - Load Images ⬇️
widgets_values:
1. Download images:
- [gs2_image1.png](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Comfy-Org/workflow_templates/main/input/gs2_image1.png)
- [gs2_image2.png](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Comfy-Org/workflow_templates/main/input/gs2_image2.png)
- [gs2_image3.png](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Comfy-Org/workflow_templates/main/input/gs2_image3.png)
- [gs2_image4.png](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Comfy-Org/workflow_templates/main/input/gs2_image4.png)

2. Upload images to all 4 Load Image nodes.

nodes.title: VRAM Usage
widgets_values:
Testing on RTX 4090 24GB
- Size: 640×640
- Frame count: 81
- VRAM usage: 84%
- Duration: 557s

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Negative Prompt)
widgets_values: 色调艳丽，过曝，静态，细节模糊不清，字幕，风格，作品，画作，画面，静止，整体发灰，最差质量，低质量，JPEG压缩残留，丑陋的，残缺的，多余的手指，画得不好的手部，画得不好的脸部，畸形的，毁容的，形态畸形的肢体，手指融合，静止不动的画面，杂乱的背景，三条腿，背景人很多，倒着走

nodes.title: Video Size
widgets_values: By default, we set the video to a smaller size for users with low VRAM. If you have enough VRAM, you can change the size
